Notes: SMSU trailed 63-45 with 5:00 left in fourth quarter, rallied to within 63-61
with 1:11 left and had game-tying shot blocked with 26 seconds left.
Game.Officials: Jon Garrow,  Chad DeJong,  Shawn Winter
